sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92527" key="r(iptastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥιπτ-αστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n92527.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tossing to and fro</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ῥ.</foreign>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥιπτασμός</foreign>, M. Ant.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
